limitations.primary_limitation: 99acres.com completely blocks access from server/cloud environments (Akamai/EdgeSuite protection). All listing contact numbers are hidden behind interactive buttons requiring browser JavaScript execution and often login/authentication.
limitations.secondary_limitation: z-ai SDK web_search and page_reader APIs were rate-limited (HTTP 429) throughout the entire session, preventing use of these tools.
limitations.tertiary_limitation: Google Search, DuckDuckGo, and MagicBricks all block or redirect automated access from server IPs.
limitations.data_sources_used: Yahoo/Bing search engine result snippets provided the primary data for this session.
